title: Lighting Installation
desc: We provide professional lighting installation services for homes, condos, and commercial properties across the GTA. Our team installs interior and exterior lighting, including pot lights, fixtures, LED upgrades, and custom lighting solutions. Whether you’re renovating, upgrading for energy efficiency, or improving visibility and design, we deliver safe, code-compliant installations with clean workmanship and reliable results.

Lighting Services Toronto\
Looking for reliable lighting and electrical services in Toronto? QuickFast provides a full range of professional lighting solutions for residential and commercial properties.\
Our experienced electricians help you choose the right lighting design to enhance both the look and functionality of your space, with a strong focus on safety, quality workmanship, and energy-efficient solutions.

\
Light Fixture Installation & Repair\
Whether you’re upgrading your home or dealing with a faulty fixture, QuickFast is here to help. From flickering chandeliers to new wall sconces in a renovation project, we handle all types of lighting installation and repair with precision and care.

[INQUIRE TODAY](https://www.quickfast.ca/contact-us)

Led Lighting Installation

1

### Accent Lighting Installation

![Modern Dining Area](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_7b68d8bfee1543bf9fc2b53e69a48602~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_223,h_223,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Modern%20Dining%20Area.jpg)

Accent lighting enhances the look and feel of your space by highlighting key features such as artwork, architectural details, or décor. It’s designed to create ambiance and add visual interest rather than provide general lighting.

 

Properly placed accent lighting can transform an ordinary room into a visually striking space. Our team helps you design and position lighting to achieve the perfect balance of style and function.

2

### Dimmer Switch Installation

![Electrical Wiring Repair](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_aae85a27bea04ef4b7a401e9b1671501~mv2.jpeg/v1/fill/w_223,h_223,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Electrical%20Wiring%20Repair.jpeg)

Dimmer switches give you full control over your lighting levels, allowing you to adjust brightness to suit any time of day or mood. Ideal for living rooms, kitchens, and other high-traffic areas, dimmers also help improve energy efficiency and extend the life of your lighting.

 

They provide flexibility for different activities, from bright task lighting to soft ambient settings. Our electricians ensure seamless installation and compatibility with your existing fixtures.

3

### Lighting Timer Installation

![Smart Home Setup](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_5d9a451e27fc43c8a76badd99c5c0dbb~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_223,h_223,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Smart%20Home%20Setup.jpg)

Lighting timers add convenience, security, and peace of mind. Perfect for homeowners who travel or are frequently away, timers can be programmed or controlled remotely to give the appearance that someone is home—helping to deter potential intrusions while maintaining energy efficiency.

 

They also help automate your daily routine by turning lights on and off at set times. We install reliable timer systems that are easy to use and tailored to your schedule.

## A Bright Step Forward

Need a licensed electrician for wiring repairs, lighting installation, or any other electrical service? Our experienced team is ready to deliver safe, efficient, and high-quality electrical solutions across Toronto and the GTA.

​

Get in touch with us today to schedule a service or request a quote—we’re here to keep your home or business powered with confidence and care.

## Why Choose Us?

You need an electrical team that understands the demands of today’s modern homes—and delivers without delay. At QuickFast, we focus on solutions, not questions. Whether it’s interior or exterior pot light installation or a full home rewiring project, our experienced electricians are ready to support you from planning to completion.

​

Homeowners trust us for our reliability, quality workmanship, and commitment to getting the job done right the first time. From small upgrades to large-scale electrical projects, we make the process simple, efficient, and stress-free.

 

Contact QuickFast today to request a free estimate and schedule your electrical service.
